Practice Management

Best EHR software for solo therapists

Last updated: January 15, 2025 • 5 min read

Best EHR software for solo therapists

As a solo therapist, you understand the importance of having an efficient and organized practice. One of the biggest pain points for many solo therapists is managing their electronic health records (EHRs) and practice management tasks. You may be struggling to find an EHR software that meets your specific needs, is easy to use, and fits within your budget. In this post, we will cover the best EHR software for solo therapists, highlighting their features, pricing, and pros and cons. We will also provide a head-to-head comparison of the top EHR software and offer guidance on who should choose which one.

You are likely looking for an EHR software that streamlines your clinical and administrative tasks, allowing you to focus on what matters most - providing excellent care to your clients. With so many options available, it can be overwhelming to decide which one to choose. This post aims to provide you with a comprehensive overview of the top EHR software for solo therapists, helping you make an informed decision that suits your practice’s unique needs.

Quick Verdict

After reviewing the top EHR software for solo therapists, we recommend SimplePractice as the best option. SimplePractice offers a comprehensive set of features, including integrated billing, telehealth capabilities, and a client portal, making it an ideal choice for solo therapists who want to streamline their practice management tasks.

SimplePractice is a user-friendly and affordable EHR software that meets the needs of solo therapists, providing a range of features and excellent customer support. With its per-practitioner, per-month pricing model, SimplePractice is an excellent choice for solo therapists who want to manage their practice efficiently and effectively.

SimplePractice

SimplePractice is a popular EHR software designed specifically for solo therapists and small practices. Its pricing model is based on a per-practitioner, per-month fee, making it an affordable option for solo therapists. SimplePractice offers a range of features, including integrated billing, telehealth capabilities, and a client portal. These features allow you to manage your practice efficiently, from scheduling appointments to billing insurance claims.

The pros of SimplePractice include its user-friendly interface, which requires minimal training, and its excellent customer support. SimplePractice also offers a high level of customization, allowing you to tailor workflows and note templates to your specific needs. Additionally, SimplePractice is HIPAA compliant and uses data encryption to ensure the security and integrity of your clients’ data.

However, some solo therapists may find SimplePractice’s feature set limited compared to other EHR software. For example, SimplePractice does not offer as many note templates as some other EHR software, which may require you to create your own templates from scratch. Nevertheless, SimplePractice’s ease of use and excellent customer support make it an ideal choice for solo therapists who want to streamline their practice management tasks.

SimplePractice is best for solo therapists who want a comprehensive EHR software that is easy to use and affordable. If you are looking for a user-friendly interface, excellent customer support, and a range of features to manage your practice, SimplePractice is an excellent choice.

TherapyNotes

TherapyNotes is another popular EHR software designed for solo therapists and small practices. Its pricing model is tiered, based on the number of clients you have, making it a flexible option for solo therapists with varying caseloads. TherapyNotes offers a range of features, including streamlined documentation, insurance claims, and patient reminders. These features allow you to manage your practice efficiently, from documenting client sessions to sending reminders and billing insurance claims.

The pros of TherapyNotes include its comprehensive feature set, which includes a wide range of note templates and workflows. TherapyNotes also offers excellent customer support, with a range of support channels available, including phone, email, and live chat. Additionally, TherapyNotes is HIPAA compliant and uses data encryption to ensure the security and integrity of your clients’ data.

However, some solo therapists may find TherapyNotes’ pricing model confusing, as it is based on a tiered system. This may require you to upgrade or downgrade your plan as your caseload changes, which can be inconvenient. Nevertheless, TherapyNotes’ comprehensive feature set and excellent customer support make it an ideal choice for solo therapists who want a robust EHR software.

TherapyNotes is best for solo therapists who want a comprehensive EHR software with a wide range of features and excellent customer support. If you are looking for a robust EHR software that can manage your practice’s complex needs, TherapyNotes is an excellent choice.

TheraNest

TheraNest is a cloud-based EHR software designed for solo therapists and small practices. Its pricing model is based on a per-practitioner, per-month fee, making it an affordable option for solo therapists. TheraNest offers a range of features, including note templates, appointment scheduling, and insurance billing. These features allow you to manage your practice efficiently, from scheduling appointments to documenting client sessions and billing insurance claims.

The pros of TheraNest include its user-friendly interface, which requires minimal training, and its excellent customer support. TheraNest also offers a high level of customization, allowing you to tailor workflows and note templates to your specific needs. Additionally, TheraNest is HIPAA compliant and uses data encryption to ensure the security and integrity of your clients’ data.

However, some solo therapists may find TheraNest’s feature set limited compared to other EHR software. For example, TheraNest does not offer as many integrations with other practice management tools as some other EHR software, which may require you to use multiple systems to manage your practice. Nevertheless, TheraNest’s ease of use and excellent customer support make it an ideal choice for solo therapists who want to streamline their practice management tasks.

TheraNest is best for solo therapists who want a user-friendly EHR software with a range of features and excellent customer support. If you are looking for an affordable EHR software that is easy to use and customize, TheraNest is an excellent choice.

Head to Head Comparison

Here is a head-to-head comparison of the top EHR software for solo therapists:

FeatureSimplePracticeTherapyNotesTheraNest
Pricing ModelPer-practitioner, per-monthTiered, based on number of clientsPer-practitioner, per-month
Integrated BillingYesYesYes
Telehealth CapabilitiesYesNoNo
Client PortalYesYesYes
Note TemplatesLimitedComprehensiveLimited
Appointment SchedulingYesYesYes
Insurance BillingYesYesYes
CustomizationHighHighHigh
Customer SupportExcellentExcellentExcellent
HIPAA ComplianceYesYesYes
Data EncryptionYesYesYes

As you can see, each EHR software has its strengths and weaknesses. SimplePractice offers a comprehensive set of features, including integrated billing and telehealth capabilities, but its note templates are limited. TherapyNotes offers a wide range of note templates and workflows, but its pricing model can be confusing. TheraNest offers a user-friendly interface and excellent customer support, but its feature set is limited compared to other EHR software.

Who Should Choose Which

So, who should choose which EHR software? If you are a solo therapist who wants a comprehensive EHR software with a range of features and excellent customer support, SimplePractice or TherapyNotes may be the best choice. If you are a solo therapist who wants a user-friendly EHR software with a range of features and excellent customer support, TheraNest may be the best choice.

Ultimately, the choice of EHR software depends on your specific needs and preferences. You should consider factors such as your budget, the size of your practice, and the level of customization you need. You should also consider the level of customer support and the security and compliance features of each EHR software.

FAQ

Here are some frequently asked questions about EHR software for solo therapists:

  1. What is the best EHR software for solo therapists with a small budget? If you are a solo therapist with a small budget, you may want to consider TheraNest or SimplePractice. Both of these EHR software offer a range of features and excellent customer support at an affordable price.
  2. What is the most user-friendly EHR software for solo therapists? If you are a solo therapist who wants a user-friendly EHR software, you may want to consider TheraNest or SimplePractice. Both of these EHR software offer a user-friendly interface that requires minimal training.
  3. What is the best EHR software for solo therapists who need a wide range of note templates? If you are a solo therapist who needs a wide range of note templates, you may want to consider TherapyNotes. TherapyNotes offers a comprehensive set of note templates and workflows that can be tailored to your specific needs.
  4. What is the most secure EHR software for solo therapists? If you are a solo therapist who is concerned about the security and integrity of your clients’ data, you may want to consider SimplePractice or TherapyNotes. Both of these EHR software are HIPAA compliant and use data encryption to ensure the security and integrity of your clients’ data.
  5. Can I use EHR software on my mobile device? Yes, many EHR software offer mobile apps that allow you to access your practice management tools on the go. If you are a solo therapist who wants to use EHR software on your mobile device, you may want to consider SimplePractice or TherapyNotes. Both of these EHR software offer mobile apps that allow you to access your practice management tools from anywhere.

Conclusion

In conclusion, choosing the right EHR software for your solo therapy practice can be a daunting task. However, by considering your specific needs and preferences, you can find an EHR software that streamlines your practice management tasks and allows you to focus on what matters most - providing excellent care to your clients.

If you are ready to take your practice to the next level, consider signing up for Try SIMPLE_PRACTICE free → or Try THERAPY_NOTES free → or Try THERA_NEST free →. These EHR software offer a range of features and excellent customer support that can help you manage your practice efficiently and effectively. With the right EHR software, you can reduce your administrative burdens, increase your productivity, and provide better care to your clients. So why wait?
